'''Chine Gabbard''' was a native of [[Rehemsa]], but worked as a [[botany]] researcher on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].

==Biography==
Chine served as an executive on the board of [[Rehemsa Consumables]]. He threw lavish parties and was very popular among the native [[Garqian]]s. He also did research on the [[hafa]] [[Vine/Legends|vines]], a cash crop grown by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] order. Secretly, this research was to help the Galactic Empire in the development of a new [[Bioweapon/Legends|bioweapon]], as hafa pollen could be made to carry nerve agents.<ref name="GatORW" />
